s: Optimize batch cooking! Weigh meals and split portions based on each participant
d:
Make meal prep easier with this app designed for batch cooking. No more guessing portions—just weigh your dish, and the app calculates the perfect distribution.

🔹 Easily divide your meals: Weigh your full pot, and the app tells you how much to put in each container.
🔹 Customize portions for each participant: Adjust quantities based on individual needs.
🔹 Save time with pre-recorded containers: Store empty container weights for automatic calculations.

🍽️ Stay organized and reduce waste by distributing your meals smartly!
